notes:
🎨 **Full UI redesign to a commercial-grade Operator Console.**
🛡 **Paid-launch readiness sweep — 7 BLOCKERS found and fixed.**

### Added

- **3-pane Betting Operator Console** — 280 (CustomerPanel) | 1fr (NumberEntry+Numpad)
  | 340 (PendingSlip). Receipt-style right pane with single header, sticky
  footer, mono-28 grand total + 52-px primary save button with soft glow.
- **Records financial table** — 56-px filter bar, sticky table header + sticky
  footer summary inside one card, 8 columns + status chips (ปกติ · ถูก ·
  ไม่ถูก · ยกเลิก line-through).
- **Settings sidebar IA** — 200-px vertical tab list with all 12 redline tabs in
  fixed order, accent left-stripe active state, "ทั่วไป" empty-tab fallback
  routing operator to SlipDesigner.
- **Dashboard command center** — 4 KPI cards (88-px), current-draw card with
  countdown + progress + quick actions (F2 รับแทง · ออกผล · จ่ายรางวัล),
  activity feed.
- **Z-index token system** — 8 `--jm-z-*` tokens (sticky / banner / dropdown /
  modal / overlay / toast / print) so a new layer can never collide with the
  topbar or wizard.
- **Hotkey hint registry** — `useHotkeyStrip()` hook lets each route publish
  its own hint set. Every visible hint corresponds to an actually-bound
  handler (no false promises).
- **กลับเลข R hotkey + visible "กลับ · R" pill** — explicit toggle next to
  the number entry slots; the dual-meaning F2 footgun was removed.
- **Duplicate-row feedback (paid launch)** — `addBet()` now returns
  `{ added, skippedDuplicates, duplicates[] }` and the Betting page renders
  a precise warn banner ("เพิ่ม N รายการ · ข้าม M ที่ซ้ำ" or "เลข NN ซ้ำกับ
  โพยปัจจุบัน — ไม่ได้เพิ่ม"). Silent dedup is gone.
- **State banners on Betting** — saved (ok · auto-dismiss 4s) · credit-block
  (danger · disables save + reroutes to add-credit) · duplicate (warn) ·
  generic warn (validation errors).

### Changed

- **Tokens** — ported `final-handoff/tokens-final.css` `--jm-*` block into
  `app/src/index.css` (surface · text · accent · type · spacing · radius ·
  layout · elevation · z-index). Legacy HSL theme tokens kept so existing
  shadcn surfaces continue to compile during the rollout.
- **App shell grid** — outer `var(--jm-sidebar-w) 1fr` + inner
  `var(--jm-topbar-h) auto 1fr var(--jm-hotkey-h)`. Sidebar logo block now
  navigates to `/dashboard` (the redline doesn't include "หน้าหลัก" as a
  sidebar item).
- **Sidebar** — 232-px Operator Console sidebar, 3 fixed groups
  (งานประจำวัน · บริหาร · เครื่องมือ), 32-px nav items with 2-px accent
  left stripe + linear-gradient haze for the active state.
- **Topbar** — quieter; help / keyboard-shortcuts moved into the user
  dropdown so the right cluster is just Peek · ปิดร้าน · Lock · User
  pills (equal weight).
- **PageHeader** — 64-px command header; pages own their actions slot.
  24-px gutter aligns with the new shell rhythm.
- **EmptyState** — 48-px ringed monoglyph + 15/600 title + 13 dim copy
  + optional primary/secondary CTAs (with optional kbd hint). Legacy
  `mascot=` prop now silently ignored — no rooster / cartoon / photo
  surfaces remain.
- **FirstRunWizard** — ported to jm-* tokens, native `<input>` + focus
  via `useEffect + requestAnimationFrame`, deterministic disabled
  visuals at opacity 0.45, visible "Enter" `<Kbd>` hint on the primary
  button. Recognizes both legacy "FAHHANG 888" and new "ร้านของฉัน" as
  "not yet customized" so upgraded + fresh installs both behave correctly.
- **Schema defaults** — `shopName` default → `'ร้านของฉัน'` (placeholder
  that forces wizard); `slipHeader.headerLine` default → `'JaoMue Pro POS'`
  (product brand on slips before operator customizes). NOT a format
  change — only default values shift.
- **Customer-facing rebrand sweep** — every visible "FAHHANG 888" string
  on a paid surface (Login title, LicenseGate header, ConsentGate legal
  body × 2, all settings/print fallbacks) replaced with "JaoMue Pro POS
